SEARCH

Uses of Class
common.dto.UserDTO

Packages that use UserDTO
Package
Description
client.app
Client-side application scaffolding: screen navigation and the in-memory session.
server.control
Server business logic: the controllers and services that implement GoNature's use cases.
server.dao
Data access layer: one DAO per aggregate (auth, members, parks, reservations, visits, waiting list, notifications, reports, parameter-change requests).

  • Uses of UserDTO in client.app

    Fields in client.app declared as UserDTO
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private UserDTO
    Session.user
    The logged-in staff user (staff login), or null.
    Methods in client.app that return UserDTO
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    UserDTO
    Session.getUser()
    Returns the logged-in staff user, or null if none/visitor.
    Methods in client.app with parameters of type UserDTO
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Session.setUser(UserDTO user)
    Records a successful staff login (clears any visitor identity).

  • Uses of UserDTO in server.control

    Methods in server.control that return UserDTO
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private UserDTO
    VisitController.currentEmployee(ClientSession session)
    Recovers the park employee authenticated on this connection, for the server-side role check shared by every visit op.
    private UserDTO
    ParkController.currentStaff(ClientSession session)
    Recovers the staff user authenticated on this connection, for server-side role checks.
    private UserDTO
    ReportController.currentStaff(ClientSession session)
    Recovers the staff user authenticated on this connection, for the server-side role check.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    UserDTO
    AuthDAO.findStaffByCredentials(String username, String password)
    Looks up a staff user by username and password.
    UserDTO
    AuthDAO.findUserById(long id)
    Looks up a staff user by their primary key.
